title: JIT: Assertion `STACK_LEVEL() >= 0` failed in `optimize_uops`
author: devdanzin

comments.author: Fidget-Spinner
comments.body: I can't reproduce with default JIT policy, but can reproduce with `PYTHON_JIT_STRESS=1`.

comments.author: Fidget-Spinner
comments.body: I've verified that the bug is just a faulty assert and is benign. So I'll fix that.

comments.author: devdanzin
comments.body:
> I can't reproduce with default JIT policy, but can reproduce with `PYTHON_JIT_STRESS=1`.

Sorry, I fixed the repro locally to run without `PYTHON_JIT_STRESS=1` by changing the first loop to `range(4096)`, but forgot to update the issue report.
